name: Hershey's Syrup Lowfat Snacking Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup I Can't Believe It's Not Butter Light
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Spray a 9x13 inch baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
Melt the vegetable oil spread in a microwave-safe bowl on high for 1 minute or until melted. Stir in sugar. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add syrup; stir until blended. Gradually add flour and cocoa powder, beating until smooth.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely on a wire rack.
Do not substitute Hershey's Lite Syrup in this recipe.
